title: VideoWeaver: Evaluating and Evolving Skills for Agentic Long Video Generation
summary: VideoWeaver: Evaluating and Evolving Skills for Agentic Long Video Generation
whyItMatters: Recent agent frameworks such as Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw are strong at tool use and orchestration, but whether they can handle long video generation, a long-horizon multimodal task, remains underexplored. Unlike earlier video agents whose pipeline is handcrafted, these frameworks can build and refine their own workflows. We introduce VideoWeaver, an…
